revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 19 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月19日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 19일]][[zh_min_nan:5 goe̍h 19 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:五月十九]][[zh:五月十九]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q839577]] Wikidata name: 19th day of the 5th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:06, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|May 19|qq=May 19}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月十九|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 19일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 19''' is the 19th day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|qid=Q96759844}}{{efn|ja|大安|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|qq=|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1306255}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Enryaku|Enryaku]] 21st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:802|802]] [[:en:June 22|June 22]]) – Following a major eruption of [[:en:Mount Fuji|Mount Fuji]], which caused a collapse of the old Ashikaga Road, a new route called the Hakone Road was opened.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://example.org|title=Historical Eruption of Mt. Fuji and the Hakone Road|date=2021-03|qq=}}</ref> * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1560|1560]] [[:en:June 12|June 12]]) – At the Battle of Okehazama, [[:en:Oda Nobunaga|Oda Nobunaga]] ambushed and defeated [[:en:Imagawa Yoshimoto|Imagawa Yoshimoto]] while he was resting in a field near the mountain. * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 8th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1565|1565]] [[:en:June 17|June 17]]) – In Kyoto, the 13th shōgun of the Ashikaga Shogunate, [[:en:Ashikaga Yoshiteru|Ashikaga Yoritoki]], was attacked and killed. * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 16th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1639|1639]] [[:en:June 20|June 20]]) – [[:en:Takuan Sōhō|Bunroku Monpu]] entered the Buddhist priesthood at Tōkai-ji in Shinagawa, Edo. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:July 8|July 8]]) – The Meiji government issued its first official government banknotes, known as the {{ill|Taiseikan-satsu|ja|太政官札|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taiseikan-satsu|qq=|1=Dajōkan-satsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11444010}}.
== Births == * [[:en:Man'en|Man'en]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1860|1860]] [[:en:July 7|July 7]]) – [[:en:Miyake Setsurei|Miyake Setsurō]], an intellectual (died [[:en:1945|1945]]).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Shitoku (Japan)|ja|至徳|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shitoku (Japan)|qq=|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=至徳|WD=Q1207030}} 1st year / [[:en:Genchū|Genchū]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1384|1384]] [[:en:June 8|June 8]]) – [[:en:Kan'ami|Kan'ami]], an actor of Noh (born [[:en:1333|1333]]). * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1560|1560]] [[:en:June 12|June 12]]) – [[:en:Imagawa Yoshimoto|Imagawa Yoshimoto]], a military commander (born [[:en:1519|1519]]). * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 8th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1565|1565]] [[:en:June 17|June 17]]) – [[:en:Ashikaga Yoshiteru|Ashikaga Yoritoki]], the 13th shōgun of the Ashikaga Shogunate (born [[:en:1536|1536]]). * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1599|1599]] [[:en:July 11|July 11]]) – [[:en:Chōsokabe Motochika|Chōsōga–be Motonaga]], a military commander (born [[:en:1539|1539]]). * [[:en:Shōhō|Shōhō]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1645|1645]] [[:en:June 13|June 13]]) – [[:en:Miyamoto Musashi|Miyamoto Musashi]], a renowned swordsman (born [[:en:1584|1584]]). * {{ill|Tenna|ja|天名|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenna|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1681|1681]] [[:en:July 4|July 4]]) – [[:en:Sakai Tadakiyo|Sakai Tadashige]], a Tairō of the Tokugawa shogunate (born [[:en:1624|1624]]). * [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] 10th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1725|1725]] [[:en:June 29|June 29]]) – [[:en:Arai Hakuseki|Arai Hakuseki]], a Rōjū and Confucian scholar (born [[:en:1657|1657]]). (Note: Some sources record May 10 for this event.) * [[:en:Bunkyū|Bunkyū]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1862|1862]] [[:en:June 16|June 16]]) – [[:en:Hidenoyama Raigorō|Shūnoyama Raigorō]], the 9th Yokozuna (born [[:en:1808|1808]]).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|18|5|20|4|19|6|5|0519|qq=}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 19 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月19日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 19일]][[zh min nan:5 goe̍h 19 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:五月十九]][[zh:五月十九]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q839577]] Wikidata name: 19th day of the 5th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:06, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|May 19|qq=May 19}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月十九|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 19일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 19''' is the 19th day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|qid=Q96759844}}{{efn|ja|大安|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|qq=|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1306255}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Enryaku|Enryaku]] 21st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:802|802]] [[:en:June 22|June 22]]) – Following a major eruption of [[:en:Mount Fuji|Mount Fuji]], which caused a collapse of the old Ashikaga Road, a new route called the Hakone Road was opened.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://example.org|title=Historical Eruption of Mt. Fuji and the Hakone Road|date=2021-03|qq=}}</ref> * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1560|1560]] [[:en:June 12|June 12]]) – At the Battle of Okehazama, [[:en:Oda Nobunaga|Oda Nobunaga]] ambushed and defeated [[:en:Imagawa Yoshimoto|Imagawa Yoshimoto]] while he was resting in a field near the mountain. * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 8th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1565|1565]] [[:en:June 17|June 17]]) – In Kyoto, the 13th shōgun of the Ashikaga Shogunate, [[:en:Ashikaga Yoshiteru|Ashikaga Yoritoki]], was attacked and killed. * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 16th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1639|1639]] [[:en:June 20|June 20]]) – [[:en:Takuan Sōhō|Bunroku Monpu]] entered the Buddhist priesthood at Tōkai-ji in Shinagawa, Edo. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:July 8|July 8]]) – The Meiji government issued its first official government banknotes, known as the {{ill|Taiseikan-satsu|ja|太政官札|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taiseikan-satsu|qq=|1=Dajōkan-satsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11444010}}.
== Births == * [[:en:Man'en|Man'en]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1860|1860]] [[:en:July 7|July 7]]) – [[:en:Miyake Setsurei|Miyake Setsurō]], an intellectual (died [[:en:1945|1945]]).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Shitoku (Japan)|ja|至徳|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shitoku (Japan)|qq=|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=至徳|WD=Q1207030}} 1st year / [[:en:Genchū|Genchū]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1384|1384]] [[:en:June 8|June 8]]) – [[:en:Kan'ami|Kan'ami]], an actor of Noh (born [[:en:1333|1333]]). * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1560|1560]] [[:en:June 12|June 12]]) – [[:en:Imagawa Yoshimoto|Imagawa Yoshimoto]], a military commander (born [[:en:1519|1519]]). * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 8th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1565|1565]] [[:en:June 17|June 17]]) – [[:en:Ashikaga Yoshiteru|Ashikaga Yoritoki]], the 13th shōgun of the Ashikaga Shogunate (born [[:en:1536|1536]]). * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1599|1599]] [[:en:July 11|July 11]]) – [[:en:Chōsokabe Motochika|Chōsōga–be Motonaga]], a military commander (born [[:en:1539|1539]]). * [[:en:Shōhō|Shōhō]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1645|1645]] [[:en:June 13|June 13]]) – [[:en:Miyamoto Musashi|Miyamoto Musashi]], a renowned swordsman (born [[:en:1584|1584]]). * {{ill|Tenna|ja|天名|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenna|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1681|1681]] [[:en:July 4|July 4]]) – [[:en:Sakai Tadakiyo|Sakai Tadashige]], a Tairō of the Tokugawa shogunate (born [[:en:1624|1624]]). * [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] 10th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1725|1725]] [[:en:June 29|June 29]]) – [[:en:Arai Hakuseki|Arai Hakuseki]], a Rōjū and Confucian scholar (born [[:en:1657|1657]]). (Note: Some sources record May 10 for this event.) * [[:en:Bunkyū|Bunkyū]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1862|1862]] [[:en:June 16|June 16]]) – [[:en:Hidenoyama Raigorō|Shūnoyama Raigorō]], the 9th Yokozuna (born [[:en:1808|1808]]).

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 19 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月19日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 19일]][[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 19 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:五月十九]][[zh:五月十九]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q839577]] Wikidata name: 19th day of the 5th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:06, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|May 19|qq=May 19}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月十九|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 19일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 19''' is the 19th day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|WD=Q96759844}}{{efn|ja|大安|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|qq=|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1306255}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Enryaku|Enryaku]] 21st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:802|802]] [[:en:June 22|June 22]]) – Following a major eruption of [[:en:Mount Fuji|Mount Fuji]], which caused a collapse of the old Ashikaga Road, a new route called the Hakone Road was opened.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://example.org|title=Historical Eruption of Mt. Fuji and the Hakone Road|date=2021-03|qq=}}</ref> * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1560|1560]] [[:en:June 12|June 12]]) – At the Battle of Okehazama, [[:en:Oda Nobunaga|Oda Nobunaga]] ambushed and defeated [[:en:Imagawa Yoshimoto|Imagawa Yoshimoto]] while he was resting in a field near the mountain. * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 8th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1565|1565]] [[:en:June 17|June 17]]) – In Kyoto, the 13th shōgun of the Ashikaga Shogunate, [[:en:Ashikaga Yoshiteru|Ashikaga Yoritoki]], was attacked and killed. * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 16th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1639|1639]] [[:en:June 20|June 20]]) – [[:en:Takuan Sōhō|Bunroku Monpu]] entered the Buddhist priesthood at Tōkai-ji in Shinagawa, Edo. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:July 8|July 8]]) – The Meiji government issued its first official government banknotes, known as the {{ill|Taiseikan-satsu|ja|太政官札|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taiseikan-satsu|qq=|1=Dajōkan-satsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11444010}}.
== Births == * [[:en:Man'en|Man'en]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1860|1860]] [[:en:July 7|July 7]]) – [[:en:Miyake Setsurei|Miyake Setsurō]], an intellectual (died [[:en:1945|1945]]).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Shitoku (Japan)|ja|至徳|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shitoku (Japan)|qq=|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=至徳|WD=Q1207030}} 1st year / [[:en:Genchū|Genchū]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1384|1384]] [[:en:June 8|June 8]]) – [[:en:Kan'ami|Kan'ami]], an actor of Noh (born [[:en:1333|1333]]). * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1560|1560]] [[:en:June 12|June 12]]) – [[:en:Imagawa Yoshimoto|Imagawa Yoshimoto]], a military commander (born [[:en:1519|1519]]). * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 8th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1565|1565]] [[:en:June 17|June 17]]) – [[:en:Ashikaga Yoshiteru|Ashikaga Yoritoki]], the 13th shōgun of the Ashikaga Shogunate (born [[:en:1536|1536]]). * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1599|1599]] [[:en:July 11|July 11]]) – [[:en:Chōsokabe Motochika|Chōsōga–be Motonaga]], a military commander (born [[:en:1539|1539]]). * [[:en:Shōhō|Shōhō]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1645|1645]] [[:en:June 13|June 13]]) – [[:en:Miyamoto Musashi|Miyamoto Musashi]], a renowned swordsman (born [[:en:1584|1584]]). * {{ill|Tenna|ja|天名|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenna|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1681|1681]] [[:en:July 4|July 4]]) – [[:en:Sakai Tadakiyo|Sakai Tadashige]], a Tairō of the Tokugawa shogunate (born [[:en:1624|1624]]). * [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] 10th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1725|1725]] [[:en:June 29|June 29]]) – [[:en:Arai Hakuseki|Arai Hakuseki]], a Rōjū and Confucian scholar (born [[:en:1657|1657]]). (Note: Some sources record May 10 for this event.) * [[:en:Bunkyū|Bunkyū]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1862|1862]] [[:en:June 16|June 16]]) – [[:en:Hidenoyama Raigorō|Shūnoyama Raigorō]], the 9th Yokozuna (born [[:en:1808|1808]]).

[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] [[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] <!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 19 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月十九]] <!--zhwiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 19 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月十九]] {{wikidata link|Q839577}} [[Category:Pages linked to by wikidata]] [[Category:Matching pagename on wikidata]]

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 19 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月19日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 19일]][[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 19 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:五月十九]][[zh:五月十九]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q839577]] Wikidata name: 19th day of the 5th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:06, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|May 19|qq=May 19}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月十九|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 19일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 19''' is the 19th day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|WD=Q96759844}}{{efn|ja|大安|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1306255}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Enryaku|Enryaku]] 21st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:802|802]] [[:en:June 22|June 22]]) – Following a major eruption of [[:en:Mount Fuji|Mount Fuji]], which caused a collapse of the old Ashikaga Road, a new route called the Hakone Road was opened.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://example.org|title=Historical Eruption of Mt. Fuji and the Hakone Road|date=2021-03|qq=}}</ref> * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1560|1560]] [[:en:June 12|June 12]]) – At the Battle of Okehazama, [[:en:Oda Nobunaga|Oda Nobunaga]] ambushed and defeated [[:en:Imagawa Yoshimoto|Imagawa Yoshimoto]] while he was resting in a field near the mountain. * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 8th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1565|1565]] [[:en:June 17|June 17]]) – In Kyoto, the 13th shōgun of the Ashikaga Shogunate, [[:en:Ashikaga Yoshiteru|Ashikaga Yoritoki]], was attacked and killed. * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 16th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1639|1639]] [[:en:June 20|June 20]]) – [[:en:Takuan Sōhō|Bunroku Monpu]] entered the Buddhist priesthood at Tōkai-ji in Shinagawa, Edo. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:July 8|July 8]]) – The Meiji government issued its first official government banknotes, known as the {{ill|Taiseikan-satsu|ja|太政官札|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taiseikan-satsu|1=Dajōkan-satsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11444010}}.
== Births == * [[:en:Man'en|Man'en]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1860|1860]] [[:en:July 7|July 7]]) – [[:en:Miyake Setsurei|Miyake Setsurō]], an intellectual (died [[:en:1945|1945]]).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Shitoku (Japan)|ja|至徳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shitoku (Japan)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=至徳|WD=Q1207030}} 1st year / [[:en:Genchū|Genchū]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1384|1384]] [[:en:June 8|June 8]]) – [[:en:Kan'ami|Kan'ami]], an actor of Noh (born [[:en:1333|1333]]). * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1560|1560]] [[:en:June 12|June 12]]) – [[:en:Imagawa Yoshimoto|Imagawa Yoshimoto]], a military commander (born [[:en:1519|1519]]). * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 8th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1565|1565]] [[:en:June 17|June 17]]) – [[:en:Ashikaga Yoshiteru|Ashikaga Yoritoki]], the 13th shōgun of the Ashikaga Shogunate (born [[:en:1536|1536]]). * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1599|1599]] [[:en:July 11|July 11]]) – [[:en:Chōsokabe Motochika|Chōsōga–be Motonaga]], a military commander (born [[:en:1539|1539]]). * [[:en:Shōhō|Shōhō]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1645|1645]] [[:en:June 13|June 13]]) – [[:en:Miyamoto Musashi|Miyamoto Musashi]], a renowned swordsman (born [[:en:1584|1584]]). * {{ill|Tenna|ja|天名|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenna|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1681|1681]] [[:en:July 4|July 4]]) – [[:en:Sakai Tadakiyo|Sakai Tadashige]], a Tairō of the Tokugawa shogunate (born [[:en:1624|1624]]). * [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] 10th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1725|1725]] [[:en:June 29|June 29]]) – [[:en:Arai Hakuseki|Arai Hakuseki]], a Rōjū and Confucian scholar (born [[:en:1657|1657]]). (Note: Some sources record May 10 for this event.) * [[:en:Bunkyū|Bunkyū]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1862|1862]] [[:en:June 16|June 16]]) – [[:en:Hidenoyama Raigorō|Shūnoyama Raigorō]], the 9th Yokozuna (born [[:en:1808|1808]]).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|18|5|20|4|19|6|5|0519|qq=}}

revision.comment: Bot: Add Wikidata has short description - based on Wikidata English short description
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 19 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月19日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 19일]][[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 19 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:五月十九]][[zh:五月十九]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q839577]] Wikidata name: 19th day of the 5th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:06, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|May 19|qq=May 19}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月十九|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 19일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 19''' is the 19th day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|WD=Q96759844}}{{efn|ja|大安|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1306255}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Enryaku|Enryaku]] 21st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:802|802]] [[:en:June 22|June 22]]) – Following a major eruption of [[:en:Mount Fuji|Mount Fuji]], which caused a collapse of the old Ashikaga Road, a new route called the Hakone Road was opened.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://example.org|title=Historical Eruption of Mt. Fuji and the Hakone Road|date=2021-03|qq=}}</ref> * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1560|1560]] [[:en:June 12|June 12]]) – At the Battle of Okehazama, [[:en:Oda Nobunaga|Oda Nobunaga]] ambushed and defeated [[:en:Imagawa Yoshimoto|Imagawa Yoshimoto]] while he was resting in a field near the mountain. * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 8th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1565|1565]] [[:en:June 17|June 17]]) – In Kyoto, the 13th shōgun of the Ashikaga Shogunate, [[:en:Ashikaga Yoshiteru|Ashikaga Yoritoki]], was attacked and killed. * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 16th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1639|1639]] [[:en:June 20|June 20]]) – [[:en:Takuan Sōhō|Bunroku Monpu]] entered the Buddhist priesthood at Tōkai-ji in Shinagawa, Edo. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:July 8|July 8]]) – The Meiji government issued its first official government banknotes, known as the {{ill|Taiseikan-satsu|ja|太政官札|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taiseikan-satsu|1=Dajōkan-satsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11444010}}.
== Births == * [[:en:Man'en|Man'en]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1860|1860]] [[:en:July 7|July 7]]) – [[:en:Miyake Setsurei|Miyake Setsurō]], an intellectual (died [[:en:1945|1945]]).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Shitoku (Japan)|ja|至徳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shitoku (Japan)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=至徳|WD=Q1207030}} 1st year / [[:en:Genchū|Genchū]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1384|1384]] [[:en:June 8|June 8]]) – [[:en:Kan'ami|Kan'ami]], an actor of Noh (born [[:en:1333|1333]]). * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1560|1560]] [[:en:June 12|June 12]]) – [[:en:Imagawa Yoshimoto|Imagawa Yoshimoto]], a military commander (born [[:en:1519|1519]]). * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 8th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1565|1565]] [[:en:June 17|June 17]]) – [[:en:Ashikaga Yoshiteru|Ashikaga Yoritoki]], the 13th shōgun of the Ashikaga Shogunate (born [[:en:1536|1536]]). * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1599|1599]] [[:en:July 11|July 11]]) – [[:en:Chōsokabe Motochika|Chōsōga–be Motonaga]], a military commander (born [[:en:1539|1539]]). * [[:en:Shōhō|Shōhō]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1645|1645]] [[:en:June 13|June 13]]) – [[:en:Miyamoto Musashi|Miyamoto Musashi]], a renowned swordsman (born [[:en:1584|1584]]). * {{ill|Tenna|ja|天名|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenna|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1681|1681]] [[:en:July 4|July 4]]) – [[:en:Sakai Tadakiyo|Sakai Tadashige]], a Tairō of the Tokugawa shogunate (born [[:en:1624|1624]]). * [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] 10th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1725|1725]] [[:en:June 29|June 29]]) – [[:en:Arai Hakuseki|Arai Hakuseki]], a Rōjū and Confucian scholar (born [[:en:1657|1657]]). (Note: Some sources record May 10 for this event.) * [[:en:Bunkyū|Bunkyū]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1862|1862]] [[:en:June 16|June 16]]) – [[:en:Hidenoyama Raigorō|Shūnoyama Raigorō]], the 9th Yokozuna (born [[:en:1808|1808]]).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|18|5|20|4|19|6|5|0519|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 19 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月19日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 19일]][[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 19 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:五月十九]][[zh:五月十九]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q839577]] Wikidata name: 19th day of the 5th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:06, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|May 19|qq=May 19}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月十九|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 19일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 19''' is the 19th day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|WD=Q96759844}}{{efn|ja|大安|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1306255}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Enryaku|Enryaku]] 21st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:802|802]] [[:en:June 22|June 22]]) – Following a major eruption of [[:en:Mount Fuji|Mount Fuji]], which caused a collapse of the old Ashikaga Road, a new route called the Hakone Road was opened.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://example.org|title=Historical Eruption of Mt. Fuji and the Hakone Road|date=2021-03|qq=}}</ref> * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1560|1560]] [[:en:June 12|June 12]]) – At the Battle of Okehazama, [[:en:Oda Nobunaga|Oda Nobunaga]] ambushed and defeated [[:en:Imagawa Yoshimoto|Imagawa Yoshimoto]] while he was resting in a field near the mountain. * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 8th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1565|1565]] [[:en:June 17|June 17]]) – In Kyoto, the 13th shōgun of the Ashikaga Shogunate, [[:en:Ashikaga Yoshiteru|Ashikaga Yoritoki]], was attacked and killed. * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 16th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1639|1639]] [[:en:June 20|June 20]]) – [[:en:Takuan Sōhō|Bunroku Monpu]] entered the Buddhist priesthood at Tōkai-ji in Shinagawa, Edo. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:July 8|July 8]]) – The Meiji government issued its first official government banknotes, known as the {{ill|Taiseikan-satsu|ja|太政官札|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taiseikan-satsu|1=Dajōkan-satsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11444010}}.
== Births == * [[:en:Man'en|Man'en]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1860|1860]] [[:en:July 7|July 7]]) – [[:en:Miyake Setsurei|Miyake Setsurō]], an intellectual (died [[:en:1945|1945]]).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Shitoku (Japan)|ja|至徳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shitoku (Japan)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=至徳|WD=Q1207030}} 1st year / [[:en:Genchū|Genchū]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1384|1384]] [[:en:June 8|June 8]]) – [[:en:Kan'ami|Kan'ami]], an actor of Noh (born [[:en:1333|1333]]). * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1560|1560]] [[:en:June 12|June 12]]) – [[:en:Imagawa Yoshimoto|Imagawa Yoshimoto]], a military commander (born [[:en:1519|1519]]). * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 8th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1565|1565]] [[:en:June 17|June 17]]) – [[:en:Ashikaga Yoshiteru|Ashikaga Yoritoki]], the 13th shōgun of the Ashikaga Shogunate (born [[:en:1536|1536]]). * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1599|1599]] [[:en:July 11|July 11]]) – [[:en:Chōsokabe Motochika|Chōsōga–be Motonaga]], a military commander (born [[:en:1539|1539]]). * [[:en:Shōhō|Shōhō]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1645|1645]] [[:en:June 13|June 13]]) – [[:en:Miyamoto Musashi|Miyamoto Musashi]], a renowned swordsman (born [[:en:1584|1584]]). * {{ill|Tenna|ja|天名|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenna|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1681|1681]] [[:en:July 4|July 4]]) – [[:en:Sakai Tadakiyo|Sakai Tadashige]], a Tairō of the Tokugawa shogunate (born [[:en:1624|1624]]). * [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] 10th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1725|1725]] [[:en:June 29|June 29]]) – [[:en:Arai Hakuseki|Arai Hakuseki]], a Rōjū and Confucian scholar (born [[:en:1657|1657]]). (Note: Some sources record May 10 for this event.) * [[:en:Bunkyū|Bunkyū]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1862|1862]] [[:en:June 16|June 16]]) – [[:en:Hidenoyama Raigorō|Shūnoyama Raigorō]], the 9th Yokozuna (born [[:en:1808|1808]]).

[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] [[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] <!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 19 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月十九]] <!--zhwiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 19 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月十九]] {{wikidata link|Q839577}} [[Category:Wikidata has short description]] [[Category:Wikidata has English label]][[Category:LINKED FROM WIKIDATA DO NOT OVERWRITE]][[Category:LINKED FROM WIKIDATA DO NOT OVERWRITE]][[Category:LINKED FROM WIKIDATA DO NOT OVERWRITE]][[Category:LINKED FROM WIKIDATA DO NOT OVERWRITE]]

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 19 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月19日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 19일]][[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 19 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:五月十九]][[zh:五月十九]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q839577]] Wikidata name: 19th day of the 5th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:06, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|May 19|qq=May 19}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月十九|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 19일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 19''' is the 19th day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|WD=Q96759844}}{{efn|ja|大安|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1306255}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Enryaku|Enryaku]] 21st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:802|802]] [[:en:June 22|June 22]]) – Following a major eruption of [[:en:Mount Fuji|Mount Fuji]], which caused a collapse of the old Ashikaga Road, a new route called the Hakone Road was opened.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://example.org|title=Historical Eruption of Mt. Fuji and the Hakone Road|date=2021-03|qq=}}</ref> * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1560|1560]] [[:en:June 12|June 12]]) – At the Battle of Okehazama, [[:en:Oda Nobunaga|Oda Nobunaga]] ambushed and defeated [[:en:Imagawa Yoshimoto|Imagawa Yoshimoto]] while he was resting in a field near the mountain. * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 8th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1565|1565]] [[:en:June 17|June 17]]) – In Kyoto, the 13th shōgun of the Ashikaga Shogunate, [[:en:Ashikaga Yoshiteru|Ashikaga Yoritoki]], was attacked and killed. * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 16th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1639|1639]] [[:en:June 20|June 20]]) – [[:en:Takuan Sōhō|Bunroku Monpu]] entered the Buddhist priesthood at Tōkai-ji in Shinagawa, Edo. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:July 8|July 8]]) – The Meiji government issued its first official government banknotes, known as the {{ill|Taiseikan-satsu|ja|太政官札|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taiseikan-satsu|1=Dajōkan-satsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11444010}}.
== Births == * [[:en:Man'en|Man'en]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1860|1860]] [[:en:July 7|July 7]]) – [[:en:Miyake Setsurei|Miyake Setsurō]], an intellectual (died [[:en:1945|1945]]).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Shitoku (Japan)|ja|至徳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shitoku (Japan)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=至徳|WD=Q1207030}} 1st year / [[:en:Genchū|Genchū]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1384|1384]] [[:en:June 8|June 8]]) – [[:en:Kan'ami|Kan'ami]], an actor of Noh (born [[:en:1333|1333]]). * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1560|1560]] [[:en:June 12|June 12]]) – [[:en:Imagawa Yoshimoto|Imagawa Yoshimoto]], a military commander (born [[:en:1519|1519]]). * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 8th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1565|1565]] [[:en:June 17|June 17]]) – [[:en:Ashikaga Yoshiteru|Ashikaga Yoritoki]], the 13th shōgun of the Ashikaga Shogunate (born [[:en:1536|1536]]). * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1599|1599]] [[:en:July 11|July 11]]) – [[:en:Chōsokabe Motochika|Chōsōga–be Motonaga]], a military commander (born [[:en:1539|1539]]). * [[:en:Shōhō|Shōhō]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1645|1645]] [[:en:June 13|June 13]]) – [[:en:Miyamoto Musashi|Miyamoto Musashi]], a renowned swordsman (born [[:en:1584|1584]]). * {{ill|Tenna|ja|天名|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenna|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1681|1681]] [[:en:July 4|July 4]]) – [[:en:Sakai Tadakiyo|Sakai Tadashige]], a Tairō of the Tokugawa shogunate (born [[:en:1624|1624]]). * [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] 10th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1725|1725]] [[:en:June 29|June 29]]) – [[:en:Arai Hakuseki|Arai Hakuseki]], a Rōjū and Confucian scholar (born [[:en:1657|1657]]). (Note: Some sources record May 10 for this event.) * [[:en:Bunkyū|Bunkyū]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1862|1862]] [[:en:June 16|June 16]]) – [[:en:Hidenoyama Raigorō|Shūnoyama Raigorō]], the 9th Yokozuna (born [[:en:1808|1808]]).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|18|5|20|4|19|6|5|0519|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

Fuji and the Hakone Road|date=2021-03|qq=}}</ref> * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1560|1560]] [[:en:June 12|June 12]]) – At the Battle of Okehazama, [[:en:Oda Nobunaga|Oda Nobunaga]] ambushed and defeated [[:en:Imagawa Yoshimoto|Imagawa Yoshimoto]] while he was resting in a field near the mountain. * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 8th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1565|1565]] [[:en:June 17|June 17]]) – In Kyoto, the 13th shōgun of the Ashikaga Shogunate, [[:en:Ashikaga Yoshiteru|Ashikaga Yoritoki]], was attacked and killed. * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 16th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1639|1639]] [[:en:June 20|June 20]]) – [[:en:Takuan Sōhō|Bunroku Monpu]] entered the Buddhist priesthood at Tōkai-ji in Shinagawa, Edo. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:July 8|July 8]]) – The Meiji government issued its first official government banknotes, known as the {{ill|Taiseikan-satsu|ja|太政官札|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taiseikan-satsu|1=Dajōkan-satsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11444010}}.

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 19 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月19日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 19일]][[zh_min_nan:5 goe̍h 19 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:五月十九]][[zh:五月十九]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 19 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月19日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 19일]][[zh_min_nan:5 goe̍h 19 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:五月十九]][[zh:五月十九]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 19 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月19日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 19일]][[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 19 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:五月十九]][[zh:五月十九]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q839577]] Wikidata name: 19th day of the 5th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:06, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|May 19|qq=May 19}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月十九|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 19일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 19''' is the 19th day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|WD=Q96759844}}{{efn|ja|大安|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1306255}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Enryaku|Enryaku]] 21st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:802|802]] [[:en:June 22|June 22]]) – Following a major eruption of [[:en:Mount Fuji|Mount Fuji]], which caused a collapse of the old Ashikaga Road, a new route called the Hakone Road was opened.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://example.org|title=Historical Eruption of Mt. Fuji and the Hakone Road|date=2021-03|qq=}}</ref> * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1560|1560]] [[:en:June 12|June 12]]) – At the Battle of Okehazama, [[:en:Oda Nobunaga|Oda Nobunaga]] ambushed and defeated [[:en:Imagawa Yoshimoto|Imagawa Yoshimoto]] while he was resting in a field near the mountain. * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 8th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1565|1565]] [[:en:June 17|June 17]]) – In Kyoto, the 13th shōgun of the Ashikaga Shogunate, [[:en:Ashikaga Yoshiteru|Ashikaga Yoritoki]], was attacked and killed. * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 16th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1639|1639]] [[:en:June 20|June 20]]) – [[:en:Takuan Sōhō|Bunroku Monpu]] entered the Buddhist priesthood at Tōkai-ji in Shinagawa, Edo. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:July 8|July 8]]) – The Meiji government issued its first official government banknotes, known as the {{ill|Taiseikan-satsu|ja|太政官札|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taiseikan-satsu|1=Dajōkan-satsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11444010}}.
== Births == * [[:en:Man'en|Man'en]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1860|1860]] [[:en:July 7|July 7]]) – [[:en:Miyake Setsurei|Miyake Setsurō]], an intellectual (died [[:en:1945|1945]]).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Shitoku (Japan)|ja|至徳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shitoku (Japan)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=至徳|WD=Q1207030}} 1st year / [[:en:Genchū|Genchū]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1384|1384]] [[:en:June 8|June 8]]) – [[:en:Kan'ami|Kan'ami]], an actor of Noh (born [[:en:1333|1333]]). * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1560|1560]] [[:en:June 12|June 12]]) – [[:en:Imagawa Yoshimoto|Imagawa Yoshimoto]], a military commander (born [[:en:1519|1519]]). * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 8th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1565|1565]] [[:en:June 17|June 17]]) – [[:en:Ashikaga Yoshiteru|Ashikaga Yoritoki]], the 13th shōgun of the Ashikaga Shogunate (born [[:en:1536|1536]]). * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1599|1599]] [[:en:July 11|July 11]]) – [[:en:Chōsokabe Motochika|Chōsōga–be Motonaga]], a military commander (born [[:en:1539|1539]]). * [[:en:Shōhō|Shōhō]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1645|1645]] [[:en:June 13|June 13]]) – [[:en:Miyamoto Musashi|Miyamoto Musashi]], a renowned swordsman (born [[:en:1584|1584]]). * {{ill|Tenna|ja|天名|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenna|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1681|1681]] [[:en:July 4|July 4]]) – [[:en:Sakai Tadakiyo|Sakai Tadashige]], a Tairō of the Tokugawa shogunate (born [[:en:1624|1624]]). * [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] 10th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1725|1725]] [[:en:June 29|June 29]]) – [[:en:Arai Hakuseki|Arai Hakuseki]], a Rōjū and Confucian scholar (born [[:en:1657|1657]]). (Note: Some sources record May 10 for this event.) * [[:en:Bunkyū|Bunkyū]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1862|1862]] [[:en:June 16|June 16]]) – [[:en:Hidenoyama Raigorō|Shūnoyama Raigorō]], the 9th Yokozuna (born [[:en:1808|1808]]).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|18|5|20|4|19|6|5|0519|qq=}}

Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月十九|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 19일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 19''' is the 19th day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|WD=Q96759844}}{{efn|ja|大安|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1306255}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Enryaku|Enryaku]] 21st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:802|802]] [[:en:June 22|June 22]]) – Following a major eruption of [[:en:Mount Fuji|Mount Fuji]], which caused a collapse of the old Ashikaga Road, a new route called the Hakone Road was opened.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://example.org|title=Historical Eruption of Mt. Fuji and the Hakone Road|date=2021-03|qq=}}</ref> * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1560|1560]] [[:en:June 12|June 12]]) – At the Battle of Okehazama, [[:en:Oda Nobunaga|Oda Nobunaga]] ambushed and defeated [[:en:Imagawa Yoshimoto|Imagawa Yoshimoto]] while he was resting in a field near the mountain. * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 8th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1565|1565]] [[:en:June 17|June 17]]) – In Kyoto, the 13th shōgun of the Ashikaga Shogunate, [[:en:Ashikaga Yoshiteru|Ashikaga Yoritoki]], was attacked and killed. * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 16th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1639|1639]] [[:en:June 20|June 20]]) – [[:en:Takuan Sōhō|Bunroku Monpu]] entered the Buddhist priesthood at Tōkai-ji in Shinagawa, Edo. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:July 8|July 8]]) – The Meiji government issued its first official government banknotes, known as the {{ill|Taiseikan-satsu|ja|太政官札|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taiseikan-satsu|1=Dajōkan-satsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11444010}}.
== Births == * [[:en:Man'en|Man'en]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1860|1860]] [[:en:July 7|July 7]]) – [[:en:Miyake Setsurei|Miyake Setsurō]], an intellectual (died [[:en:1945|1945]]).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Shitoku (Japan)|ja|至徳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shitoku (Japan)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=至徳|WD=Q1207030}} 1st year / [[:en:Genchū|Genchū]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1384|1384]] [[:en:June 8|June 8]]) – [[:en:Kan'ami|Kan'ami]], an actor of Noh (born [[:en:1333|1333]]). * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1560|1560]] [[:en:June 12|June 12]]) – [[:en:Imagawa Yoshimoto|Imagawa Yoshimoto]], a military commander (born [[:en:1519|1519]]). * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 8th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1565|1565]] [[:en:June 17|June 17]]) – [[:en:Ashikaga Yoshiteru|Ashikaga Yoritoki]], the 13th shōgun of the Ashikaga Shogunate (born [[:en:1536|1536]]). * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1599|1599]] [[:en:July 11|July 11]]) – [[:en:Chōsokabe Motochika|Chōsōga–be Motonaga]], a military commander (born [[:en:1539|1539]]). * [[:en:Shōhō|Shōhō]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1645|1645]] [[:en:June 13|June 13]]) – [[:en:Miyamoto Musashi|Miyamoto Musashi]], a renowned swordsman (born [[:en:1584|1584]]). * {{ill|Tenna|ja|天名|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenna|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1681|1681]] [[:en:July 4|July 4]]) – [[:en:Sakai Tadakiyo|Sakai Tadashige]], a Tairō of the Tokugawa shogunate (born [[:en:1624|1624]]). * [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] 10th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1725|1725]] [[:en:June 29|June 29]]) – [[:en:Arai Hakuseki|Arai Hakuseki]], a Rōjū and Confucian scholar (born [[:en:1657|1657]]). (Note: Some sources record May 10 for this event.) * [[:en:Bunkyū|Bunkyū]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1862|1862]] [[:en:June 16|June 16]]) – [[:en:Hidenoyama Raigorō|Shūnoyama Raigorō]], the 9th Yokozuna (born [[:en:1808|1808]]).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|18|5|20|4|19|6|5|0519|qq=}}

Fuji and the Hakone Road|date=2021-03|qq=}}</ref> * {{ill|Eiroku|en|Eiroku|WD=Q1143341|lt=Eiroku}} 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1560|en|1560|WD=Q6613|lt=1560}} {{ill|June 12|en|June 12|WD=Q2619|lt=June 12}}) – At the Battle of Okehazama, {{ill|Oda Nobunaga|en|Oda Nobunaga|WD=Q171411|lt=Oda Nobunaga}} ambushed and defeated {{ill|Imagawa Yoshimoto|en|Imagawa Yoshimoto|WD=Q1054305|lt=Imagawa Yoshimoto}} while he was resting in a field near the mountain. * {{ill|Eiroku|en|Eiroku|WD=Q1143341|lt=Eiroku}} 8th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1565|en|1565|WD=Q6634|lt=1565}} {{ill|June 17|en|June 17|WD=Q2672|lt=June 17}}) – In Kyoto, the 13th shōgun of the Ashikaga Shogunate, {{ill|Ashikaga Yoshiteru|en|Ashikaga Yoshiteru|WD=Q447066|lt=Ashikaga Yoritoki}}, was attacked and killed. * {{ill|Kan'ei|en|Kan'ei|WD=Q1192913|lt=Kan'ei}} 16th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1639|en|1639|WD=Q6897|lt=1639}} {{ill|June 20|en|June 20|WD=Q2666|lt=June 20}}) – {{ill|Takuan Sōhō|en|Takuan Sōhō|WD=Q632866|lt=Bunroku Monpu}} entered the Buddhist priesthood at Tōkai-ji in Shinagawa, Edo. * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1868|en|1868|WD=Q7717|lt=1868}} {{ill|July 8|en|July 8|WD=Q2692|lt=July 8}}) – The Meiji government issued its first official government banknotes, known as the {{ill|Taiseikan-satsu|ja|太政官札|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taiseikan-satsu|1=Dajōkan-satsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11444010}}.

calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1565|en|1565|WD=Q6634|lt=1565}} {{ill|June 17|en|June 17|WD=Q2672|lt=June 17}}) – {{ill|Ashikaga Yoshiteru|en|Ashikaga == Events == * {{ill|Enryaku|en|Enryaku|WD=Q1373176|lt=Enryaku|1=Enryaku}} 21st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|802|en|802|WD=Q29992|lt=802|1=802}} {{ill|June 22|en|June 22|WD=Q2663|lt=June 22|1=June 22}}) – Following a major eruption of {{ill|Mount Fuji|en|Mount Fuji|WD=Q39231|lt=Mount Fuji|1=Mount Fuji}}, which caused a collapse of the old Ashikaga Road, a new route called the Hakone Road was opened.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://example.org|title=Historical Eruption of Mt. Fuji and the Hakone Road|date=2021-03|qq=}}</ref> * {{ill|Eiroku|en|Eiroku|WD=Q1143341|lt=Eiroku|1=Eiroku}} 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1560|en|1560|WD=Q6613|lt=1560|1=1560}} {{ill|June 12|en|June 12|WD=Q2619|lt=June 12|1=June 12}}) – At the Battle of Okehazama, {{ill|Oda Nobunaga|en|Oda Nobunaga|WD=Q171411|lt=Oda Nobunaga|1=Oda Nobunaga}} ambushed and defeated {{ill|Imagawa Yoshimoto|en|Imagawa Yoshimoto|WD=Q1054305|lt=Imagawa Yoshimoto|1=Imagawa Yoshimoto}} while he was resting in a field near the mountain. * {{ill|Eiroku|en|Eiroku|WD=Q1143341|lt=Eiroku|1=Eiroku}} 8th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1565|en|1565|WD=Q6634|lt=1565|1=1565}} {{ill|June 17|en|June 17|WD=Q2672|lt=June 17|1=June 17}}) – In Kyoto, the 13th shōgun of the Ashikaga Shogunate, {{ill|Ashikaga Yoshiteru|en|Ashikaga Yoshiteru|WD=Q447066|lt=Ashikaga Yoritoki|1=Ashikaga Yoshiteru}}, was attacked and killed. * {{ill|Kan'ei|en|Kan'ei|WD=Q1192913|lt=Kan'ei|1=Kan'ei}} 16th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1639|en|1639|WD=Q6897|lt=1639|1=1639}} {{ill|June 20|en|June 20|WD=Q2666|lt=June 20|1=June 20}}) – {{ill|Takuan Sōhō|en|Takuan Sōhō|WD=Q632866|lt=Bunroku Monpu|1=Takuan Sōhō}} entered the Buddhist priesthood at Tōkai-ji in Shinagawa, Edo. * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era|1=Meiji era}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1868|en|1868|WD=Q7717|lt=1868|1=1868}} {{ill|July 8|en|July 8|WD=Q2692|lt=July 8|1=July 8}}) – The Meiji government issued its first official government banknotes, known as the {{ill|Taiseikan-satsu|ja|太政官札|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taiseikan-satsu|1=Dajōkansatsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11444010}}.

{{Not to be confused with|May 19|qq=May 19}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月十九|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 19일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 19''' is the 19th day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|qid=Q96759844|1=taian}}{{efn|ja|大安|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1306255}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Enryaku|en|Enryaku|qid=Q1373176|lt=Enryaku|1=Enryaku}} 21st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|802|en|802|qid=Q29992|lt=802|1=802}} {{ill|June 22|en|June 22|qid=Q2663|lt=June 22|1=June 22}}) – Following a major eruption of {{ill|Mount Fuji|en|Mount Fuji|qid=Q39231|lt=Mount Fuji|1=Mount Fuji}}, which caused a collapse of the old Ashikaga Road, a new route called the Hakone Road was opened.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://example.org|title=Historical Eruption of Mt. Fuji and the Hakone Road|date=2021-03|qq=}}</ref> * {{ill|Eiroku|en|Eiroku|qid=Q1143341|lt=Eiroku|1=Eiroku}} 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1560|en|1560|qid=Q6613|lt=1560|1=1560}} {{ill|June 12|en|June 12|qid=Q2619|lt=June 12|1=June 12}}) – At the Battle of Okehazama, {{ill|Oda Nobunaga|en|Oda Nobunaga|qid=Q171411|lt=Oda Nobunaga|1=Oda Nobunaga}} ambushed and defeated {{ill|Imagawa Yoshimoto|en|Imagawa Yoshimoto|qid=Q1054305|lt=Imagawa Yoshimoto|1=Imagawa Yoshimoto}} while he was resting in a field near the mountain. * {{ill|Eiroku|en|Eiroku|qid=Q1143341|lt=Eiroku|1=Eiroku}} 8th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1565|en|1565|qid=Q6634|lt=1565|1=1565}} {{ill|June 17|en|June 17|qid=Q2672|lt=June 17|1=June 17}}) – In Kyoto, the 13th shōgun of the Ashikaga Shogunate, {{ill|Ashikaga Yoshiteru|en|Ashikaga Yoshiteru|qid=Q447066|lt=Ashikaga Yoritoki|1=Ashikaga Yoshiteru}}, was attacked and killed. * {{ill|Kan'ei|en|Kan'ei|qid=Q1192913|lt=Kan'ei|1=Kan'ei}} 16th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1639|en|1639|qid=Q6897|lt=1639|1=1639}} {{ill|June 20|en|June 20|qid=Q2666|lt=June 20|1=June 20}}) – {{ill|Takuan Sōhō|en|Takuan Sōhō|qid=Q632866|lt=Bunroku Monpu|1=Takuan Sōhō}} entered the Buddhist priesthood at Tōkai-ji in Shinagawa, Edo. * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|qid=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era|1=Meiji era}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1868|en|1868|qid=Q7717|lt=1868|1=1868}} {{ill|July 8|en|July 8|qid=Q2692|lt=July 8|1=July 8}}) – The Meiji government issued its first official government banknotes, known as the {{ill|Taiseikan-satsu|ja|太政官札|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taiseikan-satsu|1=Dajōkansatsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11444010}}.
== Births == * {{ill|Man'en|en|Man'en|qid=Q1193862|lt=Man'en|1=Man'en}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1860|en|1860|qid=Q7691|lt=1860|1=1860}} {{ill|July 7|en|July 7|qid=Q2694|lt=July 7|1=July 7}}) – {{ill|Miyake Setsurei|en|Miyake Setsurei|qid=Q6884225|lt=Miyake Setsurō|1=Miyake Setsurei}}, an intellectual (died {{ill|1945|en|1945|qid=Q5240|lt=1945|1=1945}}).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Shitoku (Japan)|ja|至徳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shitoku (Japan)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=至德|qid=Q1207030}} 1st year / {{ill|1333|en|1333|qid=Q6004|lt=1333|1=1333}}). * {{ill|Eiroku|en|Eiroku|qid=Q1143341|lt=Eiroku|1=Eiroku}} 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1565|en|1565|qid=Q6634|lt=1565|1=1565}} {{ill|June 17|en|June 17|qid=Q2672|lt=June 17|1=June 17}}) – {{ill|Ashikaga Yoshiteru|en|Ashikaga Yoshiteru|qid=Q447066|lt=Ashikaga Yoritoki|1=Ashikaga Yoshiteru}}, the 13th shōgun of the Ashikaga Shogunate (born {{ill|1536|en|1536|qid=Q6457|lt=1536|1=1536}}). * {{ill|Miyamoto Musashi|en|Miyamoto Musashi|qid=Q193344|lt=Miyamoto Musashi|1=Miyamoto Musashi}}, a renowned swordsman (born {{ill|1584|en|1584|qid=Q6728|lt=1584|1=1584}}). * {{ill|Tenna|ja|天名|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenna|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1681|en|1681|qid=Q7645|lt=1681|1=1681}} {{ill|July 4|en|July 4|qid=Q2698|lt=July 4|1=July 4}}) – {{ill|Sakai Tadakiyo|en|Sakai Tadakiyo|qid=Q7402769|lt=Sakai Tadashige|1=Sakai Tadakiyo}}, a Tairō of the Tokugawa shogunate (born {{ill|1624|en|1624|qid=Q6821|lt=1624|1=1624}}). * {{ill|Kyōhō|en|Kyōhō|qid=Q1145048|lt=Kyōhō|1=Kyōhō}} 10th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1725|en|1725|qid=Q6932|lt=1725|1=1725}} {{ill|June 29|en|June 29|qid=Q2659|lt=June 29|1=June 29}}) – {{ill|Arai Hakuseki|en|Arai Hakuseki|qid=Q467616|lt=Arai Hakuseki|1=Arai Hakuseki}}, a Rōjū and Confucian scholar (born {{ill|1657|en|1657|qid=Q6987|lt=1657|1=1657}}). (Note: Some sources record May 10 for this event.) * {{ill|Bunkyū|en|Bunkyū|qid=Q730266|lt=Bunkyū|1=Bunkyū}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1862|en|1862|qid=Q7698|lt=1862|1=1862}} {{ill|June 16|en|June 16|qid=Q2653|lt=June 16|1=June 16}}) – {{ill|Hidenoyama Raigorō|en|Hidenoyama Raigorō|qid=Q5752560|lt=Shūnoyama Raigorō|1=Hidenoyama Raigorō}}, the 9th Yokozuna (born {{ill|1808|en|1808|qid=Q6914|lt=1808|1=1808}}).
